title: Awesome Farmer
body:
# Awesome farmer
Utility mod that helps players to not break immature crops and other blocks.

### List of blocks:
- All crops
- Sweet Berry
- Torch flower
- Bamboo
- Cactus
- Sugar cane
- Kelp

# Demo
